annotations.description: Map of annotations to add to all resources.

labels.description: Map of labels to add to all resources.

adminToken.description: The SDM_ADMIN_TOKEN with which to create StrongDM resources. Specify this directly, or provide an existing secret to @strongdm.auth.secretName.

relayToken.description: The SDM_RELAY_TOKEN with which this relay should authenticate itself. Specify this directly, or provide an existing secret to @strongdm.auth.secretName.

secretName.description: Name of the k8s Secret that contains SDM_RELAY_TOKEN and/or SDM_ADMIN_TOKEN.

autoCreateNode.description: Auto creation configuration. Requires SDM_ADMIN_TOKEN be provided via one of the supported @strongdm.auth methods.

enabled.description: Create this StrongDM Relay or Gateway automatically.

kubectlImage.description: Full URI of the container with kubectl installed, used to create a k8s Secret. Defaults to a bitnami/kubectl image.

maintenanceWindows.description: Semicolon-separated cron schedules, the first group being the hard-cutoff group e.g. "* 7 * * 0,6","* * * * *".

name.description: Name of the Node as it should appear in StrongDM.

tags.description: Tags to add to the created Node. Format 'key=value,key2=value2'.

autoRegisterCluster.description: Cluster auto-registration configuration. Requires SDM_ADMIN_TOKEN be provided via one of the supported @strongdm.auth methods.

enabled.description: Register this k8s cluster as a StrongDM Pod Identity Cluster. See https://www.strongdm.com/docs/admin/resources/clusters/kubernetes-podidentity/ for more information.

extraArgs.description: Space-separated string of args to pass to the `sdm admin clusters add k8spodidentity` command.

identitySet.description: ID of the Identity Set with which to register this cluster.

identitySetName.description: Name of the Identity Set with which to register this cluster.

resourceName.description: Name of the StrongDM Pod Identity Cluster resource to create.

additionalEnvVars.description: Additional environment variables to add to the ConfigMap.

appDomain.description: Control plane to which to connect. Format `uk.strongdm.com`, etc.

disableAutoUpdate.description: Disable automatically checking for and applying updates. Implicitly set to `true` if @strongdm.image.tag or @strongdm.image.digest are supplied.

domain.description: (DEPRECATED) control plane to which to connect. Format `uk.strongdm.com`, etc.

maintenanceWindowStart.description: Hour of the day (0-23 UTC) to terminate connections and restart when applying updates.

queryLogs.description: Query logging options, disabled by default. See https://www.strongdm.com/docs/admin/logs for more information.

annotations.description: Map of annotations to add to the Deployment.

labels.description: Map of labels to add to the Deployment.

discoveryUsername.description: Username for StrongDM discovery. Also creates the RBAC resources required for this feature. Required if either @strongdm.autoRegisterCluster.identitySet or @strongdm.autoRegisterCluster.identitySetName are set.

gateway.description: StrongDM Gateway configuration. See https://www.strongdm.com/docs/admin/nodes for more information.

containerPort.description: Port on which the container runs.

enabled.description: Whether this is to be a StrongDM Gateway. If false, a Relay is created, and all other @strongdm.gateway values are ignored.

listenAddress.description: Address at which the Gateway expects traffic. Ignored unless @strongdm.autoCreateNode.enabled.

listenPort.description: Port on which the Gateway expects traffic.

annotations.description: Map of annotations to apply to the Service.

labels.description: Map of labels to apply to the Service.

nodePort.description: NodePort to which to bind this service, if desired.

type.description: Specify the type of Service to front the deployment.

healthcheckNamespace.description: Namespace in which StrongDM resource health checks are to occur. Associated/required RBAC resources are created in this namespace.

healthcheckUsername.description: Username for StrongDM resource health checks. Used in the RBAC resources that facilitate said health checks. Required if either @strongdm.autoRegisterCluster.identitySet or @strongdm.autoRegisterCluster.identitySetName are set.

image.description: Container repository and pull config. If @strongdm.image.tag or @strongdm.image.digest are set, SDM_DISABLE_UPDATE is set to `true`.

annotations.description: Map of annotations to add to Pods.

labels.description: Map of labels to add to Pods.

resources.description: Set the Pod resource requests and limits.

create.description: Create a Role/ClusterRole. Set to true, or manage RBAC externally

annotations.description: Map of annotations to add to the ServiceAccount, should one be created.

create.description: Create a ServiceAccount. Set to true, or specify and existing ServiceAccount with @strongdm.serviceAccount.name. Do neither to not use a ServiceAccount.

labels.description: Map of labels to add to the ServiceAccount, should one be created.

name.description: Name of an existing ServiceAccount to use.
